penalties.description: The ligating loop appears to be positioned slightly away from the marked target area on the middle appendage.

consensus_score.reasoning: Task mismatch detected: video shows task3 (Ligating Loop) content with blue braided loop material and three blue appendages, not task5 (Intracorporeal Suture). Claude correctly identified this mismatch while GPT incorrectly scored as task5. Since this is the wrong task entirely, automatic zero score applies despite completion time of 201 seconds.

Claude provided specific timestamp references (03:59 to 00:38) supporting 201 seconds calculation.

disagreements.resolution: Used Claude's penalty but applied automatic zero
